title: Fetch Snowflake Views and View Metadata
description:
Extend the Snowflake integration to fetch views and their metadata in addition to tables. Currently the REST API only returns a subset of tables and does not return views at all.

### Known Issues
- The REST API endpoint returns fewer tables than visible in the Snowflake UI (e.g., 3 of 8 expected tables)
- Views (e.g., ZOHO_LOADS) return an empty array when fetched via the API
- The discrepancy may be related to permissions on the service account used for API access
acceptance_criteria: Snowflake views are fetched and displayed alongside tables
View metadata (columns, data types) is retrieved correctly
All tables visible in Snowflake UI are also returned by the API
Permission issues preventing full table/view listing are resolved
middleware_changes: Extended Snowflake API integration to query views in addition to tables, including metadata retrieval.
data_model_changes: Storage for Snowflake view metadata alongside table metadata.
api_changes: Updated Snowflake schema fetch to include views in the API response.
implementation_notes: The REST API returns fewer tables than expected, possibly due to service account permissions. Views require a separate query or different endpoint. Needs investigation into whether the Snowflake REST API has different permissions for views vs tables.
comment_summary: Developer identified a discrepancy between Snowflake UI and REST API table counts. Views return empty arrays. Likely a permissions issue with the service account. Investigation ongoing.
